data.name: GitBranchSplitter_Description
data.value: Splits a Git branch into path-based branches.

data.name: GitBranchSplitter_Help
data.value: Creates split branches from a source branch and preserves the current program orchestration around the generated command-line parser.

data.name: GitBranchSplitter_Repo_Description
data.value: Path to the Git repository working directory.

data.name: GitBranchSplitter_Source_Description
data.value: Name of the local source branch to split.

data.name: GitBranchSplitter_Prefix_Description
data.value: Prefix used for generated branch names.

data.name: GitBranchSplitter_Overwrite_Description
data.value: Overwrite existing generated branches if they already exist.

data.name: GitBranchSplitter_AuthorName_Description
data.value: Author name used for generated synthetic commits.

data.name: GitBranchSplitter_AuthorEmail_Description
data.value: Author email used for generated synthetic commits.
